_freeze.provenance: Measured on the class-freeze pilot: 60 seqs/image × 6 images (4 train: alpine:latest busybox-ash, debian:stable-slim dash, node:22-slim dash, redis:7-alpine busybox-ash; 1 inner-val: fedora:latest bash; 1 final-test: rockylinux:9 bash) = 360 seqs / 10083 steps, arm=full, seed 0, --pin-digests (subset of dockerfs3-digests.json, 0 drift). benchmarks/class_measure.py (v3-4axis-1) @ axis2p_thresh=0.96, encoder enc_e5_base (the JSON 'encoder' field reads 'custom' — lazy-embedder label quirk, the axis-1 numbers are e5). out_of_universe=0, bad_state_scope=0 (whole corpus in the frozen universe). No twin mint → axis-4 ceiling ≡ 1.0 (deterministic-by-construction; rule-5 noisy-excluded cannot fire, covered by DG-3a/b). The 12-image mint (dockerfs3-digests.json) STAMPS this file's sha and RE-CONFIRMS G-COV/DG-9 post-purge at 600/900 seqs/image; it does NOT re-derive this table.
_freeze.recalibration: axis-2' (axis2p_thresh) recalibrated 0.656 → 0.96 (prereg §2 item 3 / §4.6 calibration 1): at 0.96 linked-grep hits return to content (grep|hit|native a2'=0.839, grep|hit|mutated a2'=0.827) while genuine workspace echo-loop readbacks stay excluded (cat|hit|created-obs, readlink|hit|* = a2'=1.000 → semi-echo). All other thresholds unchanged from the v2 priors.

frozen_thresholds._note: these are exactly classes-measured.json thresholds{}; the sha over this whole file pins them.

_freeze.theta1_note: The §4.6 'θ1 ≥ ~0.46' calibration is REFUTED at P3 scale: the content cells nearest the echo/const gate are cat|hit|native a1=0.473, tail|hit|native a1=0.488, stat|hit|native a1=0.473, head|hit|native a1=0.506 — a θ1 of 0.46 would EJECT them and gut content mass. θ1 is FROZEN at the v2 midpoint 0.59 (nearest content cell head|hit|native a1=0.506 → 0.084 headroom; uname|hit|native at 0.811 is correctly echo/const). MINT-CONFIRMED: axis-1 is scale-sensitive (top-1 rose cat 0.450→0.473, tail 0.424→0.488 from the 40-seq draft to this 60-seq pilot); the θ1 ejection-safety invariant (NO frozen content cell's mint axis-1 top-1 ≥ 0.59) is re-asserted at the 12-image mint. A content verb crossing 0.59 at mint is an echo/const finding requiring a dated re-freeze amendment.

solid.note: 6 simple content verbs (cat, find, head, ls, stat, tail) on native/mutated scope; post-purge G-COV ≥500 in EVERY split at mint scale (×20). Resolve cleanly.

provisional_coverage.note: content at pilot scale (≥30-pair coverage floor met pre-purge, all axes content-shaped at a2'=0.96) but post-purge G-COV is MARGINAL — confirmed at the mint 600/900 seqs/image. grep|hit|native (post-purge 33) and grep|hit|mutated (post-purge 16): the grep verb clears ≥500/split in TRAIN only at mint (train 520, inner 180, final 280 @600) — 77% of grep hits are obs-derivable linked-grep readbacks the a2'≥0.96 purge removes; grep held-out content falls to the §9.3 G-COV cross-image battery or is reported under-floor on inner/final. The 3 composed pipe families (pipe:ls|head 35, pipe:ls|tail 33, pipe:cat|tail 28 post-purge) MISS ≥500/split in ALL splits at mint (≤440 @600) — intrinsically low-mass, resolved via the §9.3 battery not the per-verb floor. find|hit|mutated (post-purge 35) and cat|hit|created (blind, harness-faithful post-purge 22) only just cleared coverage into content at this pilot; re-confirmed at mint.

excluded_cells_frozen.note: measured (≥30-pair) cells classified out of the content pool by the §9.2 ordered precedence; frozen so. under-floor cells are fail-closed (excluded + reported, never guessed).

notable.cat|miss|mutated: sim (axis-3 exact 0.945, deterministic dialect error surface, 421 steps)

mint_confirmed_gates.note: gates that CANNOT resolve at pilot scale; measured at the mint (P5/mint). Per prereg §11 GO criterion 4 these do NOT block the class freeze — they are asserted at the mint and, if breached, the referenced fork applies.

G-COV.requirement: ≥500 post-purge content steps per content verb per split (train/inner/final).
G-COV.pilot_projection_at_mint_x20: PASS all splits: ls, cat, head, stat, tail, find (the 6 simple verbs). PARTIAL: grep clears TRAIN only (train 520, inner 180, final 280 @600) → §9.3 cross-image battery or under-floor on inner/final. MISS all splits: the 3 composed pipe families (≤440 @600) → §9.3 battery. Post-purge footprint is 909 steps = 16.2% of pre-purge content / 9.0% of all steps (NOT the 0.36% command-echo estimate — the a2'≥0.96 purge also removes obs-derivable within-trajectory revisit re-reads; symmetric across WM and every baseline).
G-COV.action_if_breached: the affected held-out content verbs report under the §9.3 G-COV cross-image battery rather than the per-verb/split floor (prereg §9.3 as designed).

DG-9_composed.requirement: composed content ≥ 6% of post-purge content steps (per prereg DG-9; per-image ≥ half).
DG-9_composed.pilot_measurement: 2.05% post-purge (96 / 4693 steps: pipe:ls|head 35 + pipe:ls|tail 33 + pipe:cat|tail 28) — now MEASURED (not the 0% draft artifact), but BELOW the 6% floor. Composed-content mass is policy-weight-driven and ~scale-invariant, so more seqs alone will not lift 2%→6% (generous projection with content-shaped families that clear coverage at mint ≈ 3%).
DG-9_composed.status: STANDING BREACH RISK — re-measured at the full mint.
DG-9_composed.action_if_breached: prereg §4.3 pre-registered fallback fork (the separately-embedded delta channel, a v3.0-BLOCKING redesign) OR the G3 composition weights are lifted before GO. The mint stays blocked until DG-9 passes or the fork is ratified by dated amendment.

DG-9_mut_affected.requirement: mut-affected content ≥ 10% of post-purge content steps.
DG-9_mut_affected.pilot_measurement: 13.2% post-purge (621 / 4693; per-image 12.0–15.2%) — PASS. Resolves at pilot; DG-9 re-measures it at the mint by design.

_freeze.ws_observed_subsumption: The collector leaves meta.ws_observed ABSENT on readback steps. class_measure recomputes it from the SST and splits created → created-obs (semi-echo, a2'=1.0) + created (content, blind); the harness _v3_cell_verbs reads meta.get('ws_observed') (absent → False) and labels ALL created as blind 'cat|hit|created' (content), then the per-step a2'≥0.96 purge removes every created-obs step (a2'=1.0). Consistent BY SUBSUMPTION not by label: the harness content pool is consistent-or-stricter than this table (cat-created 22 ≤ 30). The '...|created-obs' rows here are informational — the harness never emits that cell key. No leak; post-purge command-echo in content = 0.

frozen_eval_path_artifacts.note: sha-pinned at this freeze step alongside the class table (prereg §6 step 7 / §11 criterion 3). Any post-freeze edit = dated amendment + re-baseline.

_freeze.reproduce: `uv run python -m benchmarks.class_measure --root <class-freeze collect-root> --axis2p-thresh 0.96 --encoder e5` reproduces the tool fields + all 71 rows + class assignments + class_counts of this file BIT-FOR-BIT (deterministic, seed-free; foil sampling pinned to seed 0). The status/frozen_at/_freeze wrapper keys and the _freeze_measure post-purge block are freeze metadata that bench_versions.resolve() ignores (it reads only `rows`).

_freeze_measure.scale: 60 seqs/image x 6 images (P3 prereg scale), arm=full, digest-pinned, seed 0
_freeze_measure.encoder: e5 (enc_e5_base) — JSON 'encoder' field reads 'custom' (lazy-embedder label quirk)

post_purge.note: harness _v3_cell_verbs per-step a2p>=0.96 purge applied to content cells

_freeze_measure.consistency_note: collector does NOT write meta.ws_observed on readback steps (key absent); class_measure recomputes it from the SST (splits created->created-obs), the harness reads meta (absent->blind 'created'). Consistent by subsumption: every created-obs step has a2p=1.0>=0.96 so the harness per-step purge excludes it; harness content pool is consistent-or-stricter than the class table.
